testimonials.name: Manju Devi
testimonials.quote: After the training, we realized the importance of packaging and improved our product presentation. Our group also started an Integrated Farmer Center (IFC) to strengthen our work.

testimonials.name: Rajni
testimonials.quote: The training helped me learn online transactions & how to sell products digitally. Now, I sell school and travel bags to local shops, and even taught another SHG member to use UPI.

testimonials.name: Beena Devi
testimonials.quote: The training was very informative. I have registered for a GST number and am preparing to start my own business. After the sessions, I began using UPI and maintain my records on Cashbook.

testimonials.name: Sonam
testimonials.quote: I feel empowered after learning UPI, online selling, and basic digital skills that make my business smoother to run.

testimonials.name: Savita Vishvakarma
testimonials.quote: Through the sessions on business management, cashbook, and bookkeeping, I now understand how to plan and track my business activities properly.

testimonials.name: Sangeeta Devi
testimonials.quote: Learning UPI and digital banking has made me fully confident in handling all my transactions without depending on my husband.

testimonials.name: Sunita
testimonials.quote: I gained both confidence and new knowledge, especially about handling digital transactions; it was a sense of fear earlier.

testimonials.name: Reena
testimonials.quote: After the training, I now feel confident handling all my banking tasks on my own without any hesitation. I will also teach my samuh members.
